author: cms-sw
body:
with previous [SCRAM change](https://github.com/cms-sw/SCRAM/commit/d8eb0e1f3faf2903f5449a41b9fa37c15145fc89)  we not get output [a] on stderr. This PR proposes to revert it.

[a]
```
scram unset -sh
which: no python3 in ((null))
```
title: SCRAMV1: Fix for finding system python3
